title: Thai Shrimp Skewers
description: Quick and delicious Thai-inspired shrimp skewers, perfect for a summer barbecue. Marinated in a mixture of coconut milk, fish sauce, and lime juice, these bite-sized treats are sure to impress.

ingredients.name: Large shrimp, peeled and deveined
ingredients.notes: Fresh shrimp are essential for this recipe

ingredients.name: Coconut milk
ingredients.notes: Full-fat coconut milk for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Fish sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality fish sauce for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh lime juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed lime juice is a must

ingredients.name: Brown sugar
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality brown sugar for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: Use bamboo skewers for the best results

instructions: Thread shrimp onto skewers, leaving a little space between each shrimp.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, curry paste, and brown sugar.
Add the shrimp skewers to the marinade and toss to coat.
Let the shrimp marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Grill the shrimp skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until pink and cooked through.
Serve the shrimp skewers hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and mint.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as steamed rice or roasted vegetables.
